notes: Wave-3 Japanese-language media curation. Consolidated from: vietscout.jp 高級10選, tabispavn 出張者向け, vietscout 接待14選, poste-vn 高級, e.vnexpress fine dining, asiamystika 2026 Michelin, vietscout 日本食22選. Sources annotated per-entry as sub_sources to track triangulation.

restaurants.raw_address: 10 P. Nam Ngư, Cửa Nam, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: Authentic French by French chef. Michelin Selected. Intimate upscale ambience. Anniversary dinner standard. ~80万〜200万 VND/person.

restaurants.raw_address: 113 P. Bùi Thị Xuân, Hai Bà Trưng, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: Michelin Selected. Korean chef creating French-Vietnamese-Korean fusion. Popular with younger upscale diners. Trending.

name_alt: ラ ターブル ハノイア
restaurants.raw_address: 12 P. Lý Đạo Thành, Tràng Tiền, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: French restaurant by disciple of a French Michelin 1-star chef. 600-bottle wine cellar. Award-winning cocktails. Press Club building. Upscale anniversary / business venue.

restaurants.raw_address: 44-4 P. Vạn Bảo, Ngọc Khánh, Ba Đình, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: Hanoi branch of Tokyo Hiroo flagship. Selected wagyu specialty. Course menus available.

name_alt: ミート矢澤 ハノイ店
restaurants.raw_address: 42 P. Tăng Bạt Hổ, Phạm Đình Hổ, Hai Bà Trưng, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: Hanoi outpost of Tokyo's popular Meat Yazawa. A5 wagyu specialist. Also offers yukke and sukiyaki. Business-grade Japanese.

restaurants.raw_address: 46A P. Nguyễn Trường Tộ, Trúc Bạch, Ba Đình, Hà Nội (Le Jardin Hotel Haute Couture 12F)
restaurants.raw_notes: 12th floor of Le Jardin Hotel. Modern Vietnamese with French technique. View dining. Birthday balloon decoration available. Business + date.

restaurants.raw_address: K5 Nghi Tam, Xuan Dieu Road, 11 Từ Hoa Công Chúa, Quảng An, Tây Hồ, Hà Nội (Sheraton Hanoi 2F)
restaurants.raw_notes: Sheraton Hanoi. Michelin Selected (2023, 2024). Ibaraki-prefecture A5 wagyu steaks. Black Angus, US prime cuts. Prices 180,000–1,700,000 VND.

restaurants.raw_address: 15 Chân Cầm, Hàng Trống, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: French colonial converted building in Old Quarter. Visited by Tim Cook (Apple CEO) and President Macron. Garden seating. Casual-friendly dress code. Set menu ~2000円~ JPY.

name_alt: ベトライスエッセンス
restaurants.raw_address: Hanoi Old Quarter (west side)
restaurants.raw_notes: Royal court atmosphere. Traditional music & dance performances during dinner. Google review 4.9/5 (1600+ reviews). Per-dish ~1000-1500 JPY. Verify exact address in enrichment.

restaurants.raw_address: 27 Ngo Huyen St., Hoan Kiem (also: 7-9 Ma May, Hoan Kiem for DUONG'S 2)
restaurants.raw_notes: By Chef Duong (Top Chef contest 4th place, Vietnamese Iron Chef selection). Two branches (Ma May = DUONG'S 2). Traditional + modern fusion. Near Hoan Kiem Lake.

restaurants.raw_address: 36 Hang Manh St., Hoan Kiem, Ha Noi
restaurants.raw_notes: Established 1998. Indochina architecture. Open terrace + indoor seating. Wide drink selection. Card accepted.

restaurants.raw_address: 17 Tran Hung Dao St., Cua Nam, Hoan Kiem, Ha Noi (Dragon Hotel)
restaurants.raw_notes: Several-hundred capacity. Private rooms + terrace. Fresh seafood. Large-group / banquet capable.

restaurants.raw_address: 23 Ngoc Khanh, Ba Dinh, Hanoi (Lakeside Hotel)
restaurants.raw_notes: Inside Lakeside Hotel. Sushi counter + teppan tables + yakiniku zones. 100+ capacity large hall and VIP rooms. Business banquet standard.

restaurants.raw_address: 15a Nguyễn Đình Thi, Thuỵ Khuê, Tây Hồ, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: Upscale kappo with chef-selected ingredients and seasonal courses. Private rooms. Business / formal.

restaurants.raw_address: 84 Trần Nhân Tông, Nguyễn Du, Hai Bà Trưng, Hà Nội (Hotel du Parc Hanoi)
restaurants.raw_notes: Inside Hotel du Parc Hanoi. Chic wood-paneled interior. Authentic Japanese. Often used by resident expats.

restaurants.raw_address: No.12 - Alley 9 - Dao Tan street, Ba Dinh district, Hanoi
restaurants.raw_notes: All private rooms (except 1F counter). Sashimi assortment 539,000 VND. Seafood hot pot 550,000 VND. Per-person spend approaches 800k-1.5M for full course. Business / formal Japanese.

restaurants.raw_address: 33-35 Hang Dau Street, Hoàn Kiếm, Hanoi (La Sinfonía del Rey Hotel & Spa 7F)
restaurants.raw_notes: Tripadvisor 2025 Travelers' Choice 'Best of the Best'. 7F views over Hoan Kiem Lake + Old Quarter. Set menus from 1,050,000 VND/person. View dining.

restaurants.raw_address: 105 Nguyen Truong To Street, Quan Thanh, Ba Dinh (Le Jardin Hotel Haute Couture)
restaurants.raw_notes: Inside Le Jardin (same building as Khue). Sky bar + restaurant. Wine + cocktail focus. Seasonal tasting menus. View + drinks oriented.

restaurants.raw_address: 8 Do Duc Duc Street, Nam Tu Liem, Hanoi (JW Marriott Hotel Hanoi)
restaurants.raw_notes: Inside JW Marriott. Private Sumibi (charcoal) rooms. Exclusive set menus + premium BBQ. Creative Japanese.

restaurants.raw_address: 8 Tay Ho St., Quang An Ward, Tay Ho Dist., Ha Noi
restaurants.raw_cuisine: Yoshoku (Japanese-style Western) — steak, hamburg, house-made soba
restaurants.raw_notes: Opened 2024. Japanese chef Maki-san with experience at famous hotels worldwide. Calm yoshoku ambience. Private rooms. Business banquet capable.

restaurants.raw_address: 34 36 Phạm Huy Thông, Ngọc Khánh, Ba Đình, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: Hidden lakeside hem (alley) location. Private rooms. Various teishoku menus.

name_alt: ステーキ&ハンバーグ 也
restaurants.raw_address: 635 P. Kim Mã, Ngọc Khánh, Ba Đình, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: Kim Ma street. Stylish-yet-casual; comfortable for mixed groups. Borderline upscale but solid for casual-colleagues.

restaurants.raw_address: 52a P. Linh Lang, Cống Vị, Ba Đình, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: HCMC-popular unagi specialist Hanoi branch. Uses Nha Trang-farmed eel. Premium unaju / hitsumabushi.

restaurants.raw_address: 24 Le Van Huu Street, Hai Ba Trung
restaurants.raw_notes: Michelin Bib Gourmand 2026. Famous for 2016 Obama-Bourdain meal ('Combo Obama'). ⚠️ STREET FOOD — well below 800k VND threshold. DEFER to invalid-entries.

restaurants.raw_address: 49 Bat Dan Street, Hoan Kiem
restaurants.raw_notes: Michelin Bib Gourmand 2026 'Worth Queueing For'. ⚠️ STREET FOOD — DEFER to invalid-entries.

restaurants.raw_address: 4B Yen The Street, Ba Dinh
restaurants.raw_notes: Already in master. Confirmed Michelin 1-star for 2026 edition.

restaurants.raw_address: 61 Van Mieu Street, Dong Da
restaurants.raw_notes: Already in master. Confirmed Michelin 1-star for 2026 edition.

restaurants.raw_address: Basement 1, Capella Hanoi, 11 Le Phung Hieu, Hoan Kiem
restaurants.raw_notes: Already in master. Confirmed Michelin 1-star for 2026 edition. Yaeyama Kyori beef, Hokkaido hairy crab.
